content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The Endless Thunder Tribulation Cloud exuded an extremely terrifying thunder rule, and its aura far surpassed that of ordinary cosmic gods, and was even comparable to some powerhouses who dominated the realm.

Looking at such an amazing thunder tribulation cloud, Ye Tian muttered: "No wonder the immortal Allah of the God Race did not dare to impact the Universe God Realm, with his strength, if he dared to impact the Universe God Realm, he would not be able to withstand such a thunder tribulation, even if he held a powerful supreme treasure, he would definitely die!"

Of course, for Ye Tian, such a thunder tribulation is nothing more than that.

Rumble!!!!

The first thunder tribulation descended and blasted towards Ye Tian.

Ye Tian easily withstood the power of the Thunder Tribulation, and tried to introduce the power of the Thunder Tribulation into the small universe, absorb and refine the power of the Thunder Tribulation, and enhance the stability of the small universe.

Only Ye Tian dared to do this, if he was a other rebel, he would definitely devote himself to fighting the Thunder Tribulation, where would he have the time and energy to absorb and refine the power of the Thunder Tribulation!

There are a total of eighteen thunder tribulations this time, one is more than one thunder tribulation, just the first thunder tribulation is enough to kill the ordinary supreme-level highness, only the top supreme-level highness can resist the first thunder tribulation.

Rumble!

The second thunder tribulation descended immediately after, continuing to bombard Ye Tian.

Boom! Boom!

Ye Tian easily endured one thunder tribulation after another, no matter how terrifying the power of the thunder tribulation was, no matter how powerful the attack power was, he couldn't cause substantial damage to Ye Tian, as if he was tickling.

Finally, the fifteenth thunderstorm came.

"That's right, the fifteenth Thunder Tribulation alone is enough to rival the full force of the Son of the Weaker Era!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

I saw that this fifteenth thunder tribulation turned into a Heavenly Dao Divine Sword, tearing through time and space, and slashing and killing.

If it was the son of another era, he would definitely treat the bombardment of this fifteenth thunder tribulation seriously, but Ye Tian just threw a punch easily.

Click!!

The Heavenly Dao Divine Sword that the fifteenth Thunder Tribulation turned into was directly interrupted by Ye Tian's punch, turning into countless thunder tribulation powers and scattering in all directions.

"It's still too weak!"

Ye Tian commented.

The sixteenth thunder tribulation also came not long after, and this time the power was twice as strong as just now, enough to severely damage the weaker son of the era, but it was still easily interrupted by Ye Tian's punch.

The seventeenth Thunder Tribulation and the eighteenth Thunder Tribulation were still in the category of the Son of the Era, and they couldn't even threaten the Son of the Era like Ling Wu, and naturally they couldn't threaten Ye Tian.

Ye Tian easily survived this thunderstorm.

"The Thunder Tribulation of the Cosmic God is not terrible, and the Thunder Tribulation of the Dominating Rank is not difficult for some powerful Sons of the Heavens, but the really difficult thing is the Thunder Tribulation of the Transcendent, that is the real Great Terror! The last time I saw Ling Wu was not only the son of the top era, but also a Rebel of the Heavens. Even with the qualifications and strength of the other party, it is extremely difficult to transcend. In the past twelve cosmic epochs, there have been many rebels who have been born against the heavens, but only Yuntan Tianjun is truly detached, which shows how difficult the road to transcendence is. Presumably, many talented anti-heaven people have reached the extreme of the supreme, but finally died under the thunder tribulation of the transcendent. Ye Tian thought to himself.

Ye Tian has no pride, he has indeed survived the thunder tribulation very easily now, but he has never seen the thunder tribulation of the transcendent, and no one knows how terrible that thunder tribulation is, and whether he can truly transcend it.

Therefore, only by constantly accumulating strength and laying a solid foundation in each realm, can he survive the thunder tribulation of the transcendent in the supreme extreme realm and become a true transcendent.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian took out the spaceship, got on the spaceship, and shuttled back towards the Holy Domain.

Soon, Ye Tian returned to the Holy City Heavenly Pavilion and began another period of cultivation.

......

The many forces of the Twelve Universe Epochs are now basically stable, and they have used these ten thousand years to create their own race, and their race has reappeared in the Thirteenth Cosmic Age.

Of course, they created these races, and they can't improve their strength for the time being, they can only increase the population and provide luck.

The other effect is to make them more closely connected with the current universe, which will shorten the time for them to be suppressed by the universe, and one day they will completely become a member of this universe era.

this day.

The Supremes of the Twelve Cosmic Epochs have reunited for a meeting.

meeting.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu spoke as a representative: "Everyone, after 10,000 years of development, our major forces have developed quite well, and they have gradually integrated into this cosmic era, and our strength has been able to exert a little more in this cosmic era. And those sons of the era under our command have also stepped into the realm of the children of the era, except for one of the sons of the era level of the rebel who is weaker and died in the thunder tribulation, everyone else is safe and sound. If this situation continues, the situation will be very good. But ......"

One but made many supreme beings look solemn, and they all knew what the Lord of the Yuan Gu said.

"However, the hope of detachment is still very slim, and if we can't do it, then everything we have done will be in vain. It's time to start our real plans, the races of this cosmic era don't know our plans, and we have a good chance of success!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

At this time, the Lord of the Immortal Heaven said, "Lord of the Yuan Gu, isn't it a little early to implement that plan now?" The time we agreed with them is 100,000 years, and we are not allowed to do anything to the ten thousand races within 100,000 years, so if we implement the plan now, wouldn't it be ......?"

"Hmph!" The Lord of the Ancient Dynasty snorted coldly: "Lord of the Underworld, are you afraid? Among the forces present, it is your Hades that are the most wasteful and the easiest to be restrained, if it weren't for that existence who chose your Hades, you would have been annihilated in the Great Destruction of the Universe." "

Being scolded and ridiculed by the Lord of the Yuan Gu like this, although the Lord of the Underworld was angry, he did not dare to refute it.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said, "Besides, we are only carrying out our true plan, and we don't need to fight with all races, so we don't break the rules. We must collect the innate treasures without the understanding of all races. For the Supremes of the Thirteenth Universe Era, the Innate Arcana is no different from other Arcana, and we can completely exchange other Arcana Treasures of the same level for their Innate Arcana, preferably for the Innate Arcana of the Supreme Treasure level. The Innate Arcana of the Supreme Treasure level is of the greatest use to us, as long as we collect enough, our plan will be half successful. In addition, the innate treasures of the ordinary arcana-level also need to be collected, so let those sons of the era collect them, and we, the supremes, mainly collect the innate treasures of the supreme treasure level. "

"It's best to trade with those ordinary cosmic clans first, and don't provoke the gods and demons for the time being, otherwise it will be easy to arouse their suspicions. All races are not united, we will not reveal our purpose in a short time!"

Another Supreme Dao.

"Yes, let's discuss it in detail, and then let's start executing this plan!"

The main road of the Yuangu.
